title: saxifraga aizoon var. intacta
intro: Saxifraga aizoon var. intacta, also known as Rock Saxifrage or Alpine Saxifrage, is a flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including skin problems and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, Saxifraga aizoon var. intacta is often combined with other herbs and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
